title: Buttery Smooth
description: Improved FPS with Smooth Animations and Optimization
body:
# Welcome to the Buttery Smooth Modpack!

Experience Minecraft like never before with the Buttery Smooth Modpack! This modpack is crafted to give you a seamless and enjoyable adventure. 

![Buttery Smooth Cover](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1a5cc2fe1bfed2d6fa449deb4549e85a0bf28d74_0.webp)

## Key Features:

- **Optimized Performance**: Boost your FPS for a smooth, lag-free experience.
  
- **Smoother Interface**: Enjoy fluid navigation through menus and gameplay.

- **Quality of Life Improvements**: Add convenience with mods like Zoom, Improved Sounds, and Fancy Eating Animations.

- **Lightweight and Efficient**: Runs well on a variety of systems, so you don’t need high-end hardware.

![With Buttery Smooth ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8a9efa81ec04b7790800dae0601c3be689427044.jpeg)


### Rediscover Minecraft with better performance and a smoother interface. Perfect for both new and experienced players!

## Contact

If you want to contact Contact to: marctgamer@gmail.com
